violations.text: Fish, spices, dry ingredients, rice, peanut butter, oil packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment is to label all food products. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the front and back retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The handle to the small 2 door slider was observed in poor repair. The 3-bay sink faucet was observed loose and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Establishment is to organize products and remove unnecessary items. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The floor in the back area behind equipment has an accumulation of soil residue, old droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026
